name: Marimo
tagline: An open-source reactive notebook for Python — reproducible, git-friendly, SQL built-in, executable as a script, and shareable as an app.
description:
An open-source reactive notebook for Python — reproducible, git-friendly, SQL built-in, executable as a script, and shareable as an app.

Docs: https://marimo.io/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  marimo:
    image: ghcr.io/marimo-team/marimo:latest-sql
    environment:
      - TOKEN_PASSWORD=4867e60b625d0f876da52f0c0341d57a
    volumes:
      - marimo:/app
    command:
      - marimo
      - edit
      - --token-password
      - 4867e60b625d0f876da52f0c0341d57a
      - --port
      - '8080'
      - --host
      - 0.0.0.0
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - uvx
        - --with
        - httpx[cli]
        - httpx
        - http://localhost:8080/health
      interval: 5s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42065:8080
volumes:
  marimo: null
